channel.title: Digg AI Feed from X
channel.description: Top 10 AI stories from Digg's X-ranked tech feed with click-through links to original source content.

item.title: Apple files lawsuit against Chief Hardware Officer Tang Tan alleging trade-secret theft before joining Jony Ive's OpenAI-acquired startup
item.description: The suit claims Tan exfiltrated sensitive supplier data and internal documents.
item.content:encoded:
The suit claims Tan exfiltrated sensitive supplier data and internal documents.

Original source: https://x.com/aakashgupta/status/2075811573600575568

Digg story: https://digg.com/tech/x3wyd8wk

  • Views: 1,380,718
  • Likes: 5,829
  • Bookmarks: 360
  • Quotes: 46
  • Replies: 819
  • Posts: 3

Top authors

  • Elon Musk
  • Lucas Beyer (bl16)
  • Susan Zhang
They sure put a lot of effort into this crime

item.title: Rohan Paul and Garry Tan agree high-end AI model costs will drop fourfold within six months
item.description: They also predict localized Opus-grade models within a year from-now twelvemonth
item.content:encoded:
They also predict localized Opus-grade models within a year from-now twelvemonth

Original source: https://x.com/AravSrinivas/status/2075831774450770243

Digg story: https://digg.com/tech/uang728j

  • Views: 112,056
  • Likes: 912
  • Bookmarks: 191
  • Quotes: 3
  • Replies: 52
  • Posts: 4

Top authors

  • Garry Tan
  • Rohan Paul
  • Tim Shi
100% agree. That famous Stanford report already found GPT-3.5-level inference costs has already fallen 280X in under 2 years. And so we will see Jevons paradox for intelligence: cheaper inference will create far more demand. Multi-agent systems will be everywhere when we have Opus 4.8 class open-source model at 4X cheaper prices.

item.title: Kyutai and MireloAI release MuScriptor, an open model for multi-instrument MIDI music transcription
item.description: It processes complete audio mixes directly instead of isolated stems.
item.content:encoded:
It processes complete audio mixes directly instead of isolated stems.

Original source: http://dittytoy.net

Digg story: https://digg.com/tech/juswyeav

  • Views: 4,602
  • Likes: 15
  • Bookmarks: 6
  • Replies: 3
  • Posts: 3

Top authors

  • Yann LeCun
  • Sander Dieleman @ ICML 2026🇰🇷
  • Alex Mordvintsev
We're releasing MuScriptor, the best open model for multi-instrument transcription to date, created in collaboration with @MireloAI. Give it a recording in any genre: pop, classical, metal, jazz, whatever, and it transcribes the individual instruments into MIDI. Link in 🧵

item.title: GPT-5.6 Sol Ultra solves the 50-year-old Cycle Double Cover Conjecture in under an hour using 64 subagents
item.description: The model, prompt, and mathematical proof have been released publicly.
item.content:encoded:
The model, prompt, and mathematical proof have been released publicly.

Original source: https://x.com/_xjdr/status/2075727574525952190

Digg story: https://digg.com/tech/y82jf2t4

  • Views: 1,823
  • Likes: 10
  • Bookmarks: 1
  • Posts: 5

Top authors

  • Teortaxes▶️ (DeepSeek 推特🐋铁粉 2023 – ∞)
  • Simo Ryu
Proof is surprising short

item.title: Paul Graham says he felt relief finding a grammatical error in an email because it proved a human wrote it
item.description: Luca Ambrogioni countered the Y Combinator co-founder by asking who cares
item.content:encoded:
Luca Ambrogioni countered the Y Combinator co-founder by asking who cares

Original source: https://x.com/menhguin/status/1900054934659236239

Digg story: https://digg.com/tech/amr8btxy

  • Views: 39,969
  • Likes: 641
  • Bookmarks: 22
  • Quotes: 7
  • Replies: 95
  • Posts: 3

Top authors

  • Paul Graham
  • Minh Nhat Nguyen
@paulg thx paul

item.title: Will Brown of Prime Intellect argues rapid AI algorithm breakthroughs have entered a highly active age of research
item.description: Dimitris Papailiopoulos noted the overwhelming volume of new acronyms.
item.content:encoded:
Dimitris Papailiopoulos noted the overwhelming volume of new acronyms.

Original source: https://x.com/willccbb/status/2075840148701679960

Digg story: https://digg.com/tech/vvh9y213

  • Views: 10,453
  • Likes: 164
  • Bookmarks: 64
  • Quotes: 3
  • Replies: 13
  • Posts: 3

Top authors

  • Dimitris Papailiopoulos
  • will brown
You can thank RL and optimization theory for lack of creativity with acronyms. Bright exception: HOGWILD!

item.title: Google DeepMind's Adam Brown explains general relativity and how AI might independently rediscover fundamental laws of physics
item.description: The Dwarkesh Podcast episode details spacetime curvature and black hole mechanics.
item.content:encoded:
The Dwarkesh Podcast episode details spacetime curvature and black hole mechanics.

Original source: https://x.com/dwarkesh_sp/status/2075619763972141539

Digg story: https://digg.com/tech/unjch2gp

  • Views: 1,518
  • Likes: 9
  • Bookmarks: 8
  • Posts: 3

Top authors

  • Elad Hazan
  • Tim Shi
@dwarkesh_sp "Even I could keep up lol" — you did considerably more than keep up; those were fantastic questions. Next time let's do quantum mechanics!

item.title: e/acc founder Beff Jezos and Elon Musk tease unreleased Grok 4.5 model with vague video decoding claim
item.description: Neither party provided technical details or a release timeline.
item.content:encoded:
Neither party provided technical details or a release timeline.

Original source: https://x.com/elonmusk/status/2075889511507128812

Digg story: https://digg.com/tech/g5neh77r

  • Views: 14,192
  • Likes: 367
  • Bookmarks: 5
  • Quotes: 7
  • Replies: 91
  • Posts: 2

Top authors

  • Elon Musk
  • Beff (e/acc)
@elonmusk @milichab It's a good model sir

item.title: Apple sues former iPhone engineer who allegedly accessed proprietary hardware files after joining OpenAI
item.description: The engineer reportedly used an unreturned laptop to bypass authentication.
item.content:encoded:
The engineer reportedly used an unreturned laptop to bypass authentication.

Original source: https://x.com/ns123abc/status/2075714663182934475

Digg story: https://digg.com/tech/erh8i5id

  • Views: 11,890
  • Likes: 132
  • Bookmarks: 18
  • Quotes: 1
  • Replies: 17
  • Posts: 3

Top authors

  • François Fleuret
  • Gergely Orosz
I am sometimes really surprised by how dumb very highly paid people in tech can be. 1. Leave Apple 2. Start building hardware at OpenAI 3. Access confidential Apple files on hardware, from an unreturned Apple laptop 4. Expect... what? To get away with it? A damning lawsuit

item.title: Altimeter Capital founder Brad Gerstner debates OpenAI and Anthropic IPO sequencing on All-In Podcast
item.description: The episode also examines Meta's pricing and open-source restrictions.
item.content:encoded:
The episode also examines Meta's pricing and open-source restrictions.

Original source: https://youtu.be/PHL1j2ti420

Digg story: https://digg.com/tech/i5t236fr

  • Views: 11,842
  • Likes: 55
  • Bookmarks: 8
  • Replies: 3
  • Posts: 2

Top authors

  • David Sacks
  • Brad Gerstner
https://youtu.be/PHL1j2ti420
